title: Harvest crops in a permaculture system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Harvest crops in a permaculture system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess plants for harvest

pcs.text: Identify crops to be harvested according to the harvesting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify crops to be harvested according to the harvesting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify crops to be harvested according to the harvesting plan.

pcs.text: Determine crop maturity and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine crop maturity and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine crop maturity and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm conditions are conducive for harvesting operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm conditions are conducive for harvesting operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm conditions are conducive for harvesting operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess plants for harvest

elements.title: Prepare equipment for harvesting

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery for harvesting operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery for harvesting operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery for harvesting operations.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare equipment for harvesting

elements.title: Harvest the crop

pcs.text: Harvest crop safely according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest crop safely according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest crop safely according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Harvest and handle crop to prevent damage and maintain quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest and handle crop to prevent damage and maintain quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest and handle crop to prevent damage and maintain quality.

pcs.text: Sort and grade crop into containers according to harvesting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sort and grade crop into containers according to harvesting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sort and grade crop into containers according to harvesting plan.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Harvest the crop

elements.title: Complete crop harvesting work

pcs.text: Employ safe manual handling techniques throughout harvesting operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Employ safe manual handling techniques throughout harvesting operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Employ safe manual handling techniques throughout harvesting operations.

pcs.text: Move and stack containers to minimise damage to crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move and stack containers to minimise damage to crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move and stack containers to minimise damage to crop.

pcs.text: Maintain temperature of crop according to harvesting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain temperature of crop according to harvesting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain temperature of crop according to harvesting plan.

pcs.text: Transport crop from field to processing or storage area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport crop from field to processing or storage area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport crop from field to processing or storage area.

pcs.text: Maintain containers in good working order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain containers in good working order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain containers in good working order.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete crop harvesting work

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
